metric_notes.unique_viewers: Exact distinct cliIP count per minute.
metric_notes.unique_ua_viewers: Exact distinct normalized User-Agent string count per minute.
metric_notes.distinct_cliips: Exact daily distinct cliIP count for each FAST platform/channel on .ts rows.
metric_notes.distinct_uas: Exact daily distinct normalized User-Agent count for each FAST platform/channel on .ts rows.
metric_notes.distinct_ipua_pairs: Exact daily distinct cliIP + User-Agent pair count for each FAST platform/channel on .ts rows.
metric_notes.segment_viewers_estimate: raw .ts rows divided by 10 six-second segments per minute.
metric_notes.status_200_segment_viewers_estimate: HTTP 200 .ts rows divided by 10 six-second segments per minute.
metric_notes.status_code_segment_viewers_estimate: Selected HTTP status .ts rows divided by 10 six-second segments per minute.
metric_notes.status_unique_viewers: Exact distinct cliIP count per minute for a selected HTTP status code.
metric_notes.status_unique_ua_viewers: Exact distinct normalized User-Agent count per minute for a selected HTTP status code.
